resources.string: HazardScout helps mobile users view their current position, discover known hazards downloaded dynamically from a server, and submit new crowdsourced hazard reports.
Copyright © 2026 HazardScout ICT602 Group. All rights reserved.
Downloading dynamic hazard markers from the server…
Waiting for GPS. The map is temporarily using the default location.
No internet connection. Connect to Wi-Fi or mobile data, then retry.
Cannot connect to the HazardScout server. Check the server URL, XAMPP, firewall, and Wi-Fi.
The server responded but did not return hazard data.
The server returned an invalid data format.
Location services are disabled. Turn on GPS or network location.
HazardScout needs location access to display your current position on the map.
Location access is required to capture the GPS coordinates of the hazard report.
Location permission was denied. Current-position and accurate reporting features are unavailable.

plurals.name: hazard_count
plurals.item: %d dynamic hazard marker loaded from the server.
%d dynamic hazard markers loaded from the server.

resources.string: Your report is saved in the server database and appears as a dynamic marker for other users.
Describe the hazard clearly, including the risk or disruption
Enter a valid name with at least 2 characters.
Enter a clear location or landmark.
Provide a clearer description with at least 8 characters.
The report could not be saved.
Supported categories: Road Hazards, Environmental Hazards, and Building Hazards.
Before submission, replace all five sample profile images and member placeholders with your group’s real information.
Choose a functional Day/Night theme. System follows the phone setting.
Real phone server: http://192.168.100.23/hazardscout/server/api/\nThe phone and computer must use the same Wi-Fi network.
URL must begin with http:// or https://
Connection successful. The HazardScout API is online.
Connection failed. Check the URL, server, firewall, and network.

string-array.name: member_names
string-array.item: MUHAMMAD NOOR HAMQZAH BIN MOHAMAD SOBLEE

string-array.name: member_tasks
string-array.item: Android application structure, navigation, and application integration
PHP API, MySQL database, and admin web interface
GPS location, OpenStreetMap, dynamic markers, and marker information
UI/UX, custom icons, Day/Night themes, validation, and testing
Written report, screenshots, GitHub repository, and YouTube demonstration
